compounddef.title: Welcome to the KAdanoff-BAym Non-Equilibrium COntour (Kaba-Neco) library!

sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: Some stuff to explain why you coded all this

sect1.title: Examples
sect1.para: Many examples of how the code can be used

sect1.title: How to cite
sect1.para: Please cite the following paper whenever you use parts of Kaba-Neco:
